---
title: "Filippo Gambarota"
author: Filippo Gambarota
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pagedown::html_resume:    
    # set it to true for a self-contained HTML page but it'll take longer to render
    self_contained: false
---

Aside
================================================================================


![Filippo Gambarota](img/photo.jpg){width=60%}


Contact Info {#contact}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> filippo.gambarota@gmail.com
- <i class="fa fa-envelope"></i> filippo.gambarota@phd.unipd.it
- <i class="fa fa-github"></i> [github.com/filippogambarota](https://github.com/filippogambarota)
- <i class="fa fa-twitter"></i> [fgambarota](https://twitter.com/fgambarota)
- <i class="fa fa-globe"></i> [filippogambarota.netlify.com](https://filippogambarota.netlify.com/)

Software Skills {#skills}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- **Statistics**: R Software - Tidyverse

- **Others**: Knowledge of Matlab, Latex, GIT

- **Vector Illustration**: Gimp, Inkscape

- **Experiments**: EPrime


Disclaimer {#disclaimer}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This resume was made with the R package [**pagedown**](https://github.com/rstudio/pagedown).

Last updated on `r Sys.Date()`.


Main
================================================================================

Filippo Gambarota {#title}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### PhD Student - [University of Padova](www.unipd.it)

I'm a PhD student in Psychological Science at the University of Padua, supervised by [Prof. Paola Sessa](https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=qAZTiyUAAAAJ) from the [CoLab Research Group](http://colab.psy.unipd.it/). My research interests regard social and affective neuroscience. In particular, I'm studying the role of visual working memory in social and affective cognition. I'm also interested in unconscious information processing, especially for salient stimuli. In parallel, I'm interested in the topic of trasparent and reproducible research.

Education {data-icon=graduation-cap data-concise=true}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### University of Padua

B.S. in Psychology - 110 cum laude

Padua, Italy

2016

Thesis: Psychosocial well-being of adolescents with oncoemathological disease

### University of Padua

M.S. in Clinical Developmental Psychology - 110 cum laude

Padua, Italy

2018

Thesis: Visual Working Memory representations of infant faces during pregnancy as an adaptive mechanism. An EEG study.


Research and Internship Experience {data-icon=laptop}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Pre-Graduate Intership

Hospital of Padova - Pediatrics Oncology

Padova, Italy

2016

- Educational activities with in-patients children and their families
- Conducting a study about the psychosocial well-being of in-patients adolescents
- Discussing about clinical cases in regular supervisions

### Pre-Graduate Intership

Department of Developmental Psychology and Socialization - University of Padova

Padova, Italy

2017 - 2018

- Training in EEG Laboratory
- Following a research project about social cognition during pregnancy

### Post-Graduate Intership

Department of Developmental Psychology and Socialization - University of Padova

Padova, Italy

2018 - 2019

- Following a research project about visual consciousness and sensorimotor simulation
- Following a research project about social cognition during pregnancy
- Supervising internship students in EEG laboratory

</br>

Teaching Experience {data-icon=chalkboard-teacher}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### EEG laboratory training

University of Padua

Padova, Italy

2017 - 2019

- Supervising internship students inside the EEG laboratory


Educational Experience {data-icon=chalkboard-teacher}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Bayesian Statistical Analyses for the Human, Social and Cognitive Sciences

University of Verona

Verona, Italy

2019

Publications {data-icon=file}

### Psicostat

University of Padua

Padua, Italy

2019 - Present

- Attenting to an academic multidisciplinary group called [Psicostat](http://ip146179.psy.unipd.it/psicostat/web/index.html?fbclid=IwAR1F8-gDhqlNPFTFJZLgSeMwSQoQRzEwijU5mAPdSGjEH-bNvFjgv6O82Rg) about modern statistical methods and application in psychological research

Publications {data-icon=file}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Visual Working Memory for Faces and Facial Expressions as a Useful “Tool” for Understanding Social and Affective Cognition

Frontiers in Psychology [doi: 10.3389/fpsyg.2019.02392](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpsyg.2019.02392)

N/A

2019

**Gambarota Filippo** and Sessa Paola

Posters {data-icon=file}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Sensorimotor modulation of visual consciousness of others emotions

N/A

PhD Open Day 2019. Padua

2019

Quettier Thomas, **Gambarota Filippo** and Sessa Paola

Other Experience {data-icon=suitcase}
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

### Speaker Coordinator

[TEDx Padova](http://tedxpadova.org/)

Padova, Italy

2018 - Present

- Organizing the TEDx event
- Following and supporting the speakers for the talk

### Volunteering

Hospital of Padova - Pediatrics Oncology

2016 - Present
